name: Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Put shredded zucchini in a strainer and press or squeeze with hands to get excess liquid out.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs, sugar, and oil together until well combined.
3. Add flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, vanilla, and chopped nuts to the egg mixture. Mix by hand until just combined.
4. Fold in the shredded zucchini (minus any excess liquid) into the batter.
5. Grease two loaf pans with butter or cooking spray.
6. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Recipe may be doubled.
